use rayon::prelude::*;

// BAD: nested parallel iterators
fn process_matrix(matrix: &[Vec<f64>]) -> Vec<Vec<f64>> {
    matrix.par_iter()
        .map(|row| {
            row.par_iter() // nested par_iter
                .map(|val| val * 2.0)
                .collect()
        })
        .collect()
}

fn cross_compare(items: &[Item]) -> Vec<Comparison> {
    items.par_iter()
        .flat_map(|a| {
            items.par_iter() // nested par_iter in flat_map
                .map(|b| compare(a, b))
                .collect::<Vec<_>>()
        })
        .collect()
}
